name: Katt Williams
bio: Micah Katt Williams is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for a frenetic, profane, pimp-styled stage persona and rapid-fire delivery on subjects including race, celebrity, and politics. He broke through with the 2006 HBO special The Pimp Chronicles, Pt. 1 and the film Friday After Next, and won a Primetime Emmy in 2018 for a guest role on Atlanta. His career has been marked by frequent legal incidents alongside a string of HBO and Netflix specials.

timeline.ev: Plays Money Mike in Friday After Next
First HBO special, The Pimp Chronicles, Pt. 1
Releases HBO special Its Pimpin Pimpin
Wins Emmy for guest role on Atlanta
Releases Netflix special World War III
Streams Netflix special Woke Foke live

accolades: Primetime Emmy Award, Outstanding Guest Actor in a Comedy Series (Atlanta, 2018)
Honorary Doctor of Humane Letters, Miles College (2025)
